faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers about URL shorteners, Lynkforge features, and how to get the most from your links.

whatOffer.a: Lynkforge shortens long URLs into clean, shareable links and gives you a dashboard to see clicks over time. You can also use optional features like custom aliases, passwords, expiry, and QR codes when you are signed in.

trackPerf.q: How can I track performance of my short links?
trackPerf.a: After you sign in and create links, open the Dashboard. Each link shows click counts, and you can open Analytics per link to see activity across a date range.

whatIsShortener.a: A URL shortener takes a long web address and returns a short one that redirects visitors to the same destination. It is easier to share in messages, slides, and print.

whyUse.q: Why would I use a URL shortener?
whyUse.a: Shorter links look cleaner, use fewer characters in posts, and are simpler to remember. Combined with analytics, you get signal on how often links are clicked without changing your destination URLs.

customPassword.q: Can I use a custom link or protect a link with a password?
customPassword.a: Yes. Log in and use the Home page options for custom aliases, password protection, and expiration. Anonymous visitors get one free shorten from the home bar; more advanced options require an account.

qrCodes.a: Yes. Signed-in users can generate a QR code for a short link from the advanced options on the home page, so people can scan and open your destination quickly.

guestUse.q: Can I try Lynkforge without creating an account?
guestUse.a: You can shorten one link from the home page without logging in (subject to browser cookie rules). For more links and full features, create a free account.

privacyLegal.q: Where are privacy and legal details?
privacyLegal.a: Read our privacy, terms, and cookie policies using the links below. You can also open the Privacy Manager to review cookie-related preferences where applicable.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Monitor clicks over time and manage shortcuts.
dashboard.noDataSub: No clicks between {{start}} and {{end}}. Share a link to start collecting activity.
dashboard.breakdownNeedsPro: Referrer and device breakdown need a Pro or Business plan. Summary and chart stay available on Starter.
dashboard.exportForbidden: CSV export needs a Pro or Business plan.
dashboard.emptyTitle: You haven't created a short link yet

reviews.title: What customers are saying
reviews.subtitle: A few notes from people who ship links daily—creators, developers, and teams.

venkatesh.body: I've been using Lynkforge for a while and it genuinely helped me keep links organized and track what's performing—without a noisy interface.

dawid.body: Custom aliases, expiry, and QR in one place is exactly what I needed. Everything feels fast, clean, and predictable.

christian.body: The dashboard is the best part—click stats are easy to read, and sharing links across channels is effortless.

james.body: Lynkforge made our campaign links cleaner and easier to manage. The analytics are straightforward and actually useful for decision-making.

lily.body: Short links that look good, plus quick insight into engagement. It helps us iterate faster without swapping out destination URLs.

michael.body: Simple, reliable, and polished. I can create, copy, and share in seconds—and the stats tell me what to double down on.

privacyManager.title: Privacy Manager
privacyManager.intro: Take control of your privacy settings. Manage your cookie preferences and marketing consent choices anytime.
privacyManager.cookieMgmtDesc: Control how cookies are used to improve your experience. Disabling required cookies may prevent login and core features from working.
privacyManager.requiredDesc: Essential for login, security, and core functionality.
privacyManager.performanceDesc: Help us measure usage and improve reliability and speed.
privacyManager.advertisingDesc: Used to personalize or measure advertising. (Lynkforge currently does not run ads by default.)
privacyManager.socialDesc: Enable social features like sharing or social login when available.
privacyManager.footerNote: Note: Preferences are saved in local storage and a first-party cookie on this domain. Blocking required cookies can prevent login and core features from working.
